name: Color Swatches
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can display color swatches in product cards to help customers quickly understand product variety without leaving search results. When shoppers can see and preview available color options directly in the grid, they gain better product awareness and tend to make more confident purchase decisions, which helps improve conversion rates and reduces returns from color mismatches."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color swatches provide critical visual information that text descriptions often fail to convey effectively. By showing available color variations with interactive previews in product cards, you help customers find their preferred options faster and build confidence in their choices, supporting better product discovery and enhanced conversion through clearer product presentation."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/060a60e-9b4afe4-Swatches.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/060a60e-9b4afe4-Swatches.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "2000", "width": 1280, "height": 720}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color Swatches showcased in a product card", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#1. The Value of Color Swatches"}], "data-id": "1-the-value-of-color-swatches"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color is often a crucial product variation but can easily be overlooked or misinterpreted if not clearly indicated in the product grid. "}, {"text": "(", "italic": true}, {"text": "Source", "bold": true, "italic": true}, {"text": ": ", "italic": true}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://baymard.com/premium/guidelines/963", "children": [{"text": "Baymard Institute", "italic": true}]}, {"text": ")", "italic": true}, {"text": "."}, {"text": " "}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Applicable to many industries, color variations are key factors in a shopper's product choice. If users are not aware of color options for products, there is a risk that they will not find a suitable item and leave the store page."}, {"text": " "}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "Variations indicated by text are often overlooked when scanning the webpage, while the visual representation of the available colors provides the shoppers with sufficient information and inspiration, when it comes to the variety of a given item."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#2. Color Swatches Components"}], "data-id": "2-color-swatches-components"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Icons", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The icons will indicate the differentiation of available variants."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The swatches should be large and well-spaced to ensure smooth interaction."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Preview color option", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "When clicking on the color icons the shopper will preview the relevant image without having to visit the product page."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Additional variants", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "When all color swatches don't fit in one line within list items, the number of other colors available is clearly shown (e.g., "+8"), giving users a clear idea of the extent of the variations available."}]}]}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/3327521-5820a6d-Color_Swatch.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/3327521-5820a6d-Color_Swatch.gif", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "680", "width": 80}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color Swatch showcasing available variants. Shifting variant on click.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#3. Implications for Mobile"}], "data-id": "3-implications-for-mobile"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When space becomes limited, which is often the case with mobile sites, it's crucial to keep the icons large and prominent."}, {"text": " "}, {"text": " "}, {"text": "On mobile devices, even fewer swatches tend to be shown compared to desktop. Therefore, it's critical to indicate the number of colors available so that the shoppers don't get the impression that the color range is small."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "#4. Requirements"}], "data-id": "4-requirements"}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard SettingsFor this module to work, you will have to update a few settings in your Dashboard."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Color Mapping", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This module uses "}, {"text": "Color Mapping", "bold": true}, {"text": ". You can find the settings within your dashboard under "}, {"text": "Settings > Primary Setup > Color Mapping", "bold": true}, {"text": ". (It's the same as for the filters that display color icons rather than text.)"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Filter Settings", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Front-End is going to need some fields to be returned in the API response. Integration Steps"}], "data-id": "7-integration-steps"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a new component called ColorSwatches and you can add the code as per the example below."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "ColorSwatches.tsx"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "import {useState} from 'react';import {fromJS} from 'immutable';import cx from 'classnames';{/* search for available colors */}const getColorSwatches = (variants, colorMapping) => { let arr = []; const reducedVariants = variants.reduce( (acc, item, index) => { const color = item.getIn(['color', 0], ''); if(!color) acc[index] = false; if(color && arr.indexOf(color) < 0){ acc[index] = { 'id': item.get('id',''), 'color': color, 'swatchColor': colorMapping.get(color), } arr.push(color); } return acc; } , [variants]); return fromJS(reducedVariants.filter(i => i !== false));}{/* return an button element which changes color */}const Item = ({currentId, item, id, setVariant, swatchColor}) => { return (
